Description: Located behind a fuse door, look for the Green cross
Located behind a fuse door, look for the Green cross
Located behind a fuse door and a red door.

Requirements:
Option A: 1x Fuse -> 1x Red -> 1x Blue
Option B: 2x Fuse -> 2x Blue
Description: Located in the hangar. Accessible via two entrances: one with a Fuse/Red/Blue combo, the other with two Fuses and two Blue doors.
Located behind a fuse door, a red door, and a second fuse door.
Located in the hangar, behind a sequence of a fuse door, red door, another fuse door, and then two blue doors.
A nexus and main entrance that leads to The Crypt, Wasteland, Last Resort, and The Vault.
Provides access to The Crypt Keycard. This keycard is required to gain access to Board 5 within The Vault.
Provides access to the Wasteland Keycard.
Provides access to the Last Resort Keycard.
Door opens every 20 mins and closes after 1 min. Contains Boards 5 and 6.
Located in the vault above the entry floor in the second room after the main Vault door.
Located in the vault behind yet another door in the second room. Card found in The Crypt.
